headline: Super Micro Is Up 10% Today: Is It Outperforming Other AI Server Stocks Like Dell?
summary: Shares of Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) are up 10% in on Thursday, June 18, trading at $30 and change. headline: Supermicro (SMCI) Finalizes $7 Billion Financing To Fund AI Server Backlog
summary: Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) has completed a US$7b financing package to support its AI server business. The funding includes common equity and a Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock offering. Proceeds are intended to help SMCI work through a reported US$39b backlog of AI server orders. The deal comes while the company faces governance and regulatory scrutiny, including export control reviews and an auditor departure. Super Micro Computer has become a key supplier of AI...

headline: NETLIST EXPANDS LEGAL ACTION AGAINST SAMSUNG AND GOOGLE FOR INFRINGEMENT OF NEW AI MEMORY PATENTS
summary: Netlist, Inc. (OTCBQ: NLST) today announced it has initiated new legal proceedings against Samsung in the U.S. International Trade Commission (ITC) and the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Texas. These actions are based on the infringement of Netlist's U.S. Patent Nos. 12,646,537 and 12,650,937, which respectively read on Samsung's high-bandwidth memory (HBM) products and Samsung's DDR5 RDIMMs and MRDIMMs. The new ITC complaint names Google, Supermicro, Nvidia and Broadcom as addi
